ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (e.g., Cherbourg, Queenstown, Southampton) */,
  "cabin_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator of cabin availability (0 for no cabin info, 1 for cabin assigned) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "has_children" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger has children */,
  "has_siblings" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger has siblings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES passenger_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the passenger class */,
  "class_fare_range" TEXT /* Fare range for the passenger class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the embarkation port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin assignment */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger assigned to the cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "deck_level" TEXT /* Deck level of the cabin */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabins_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of family members aboard */,
  "family_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the passenger to the family (e.g., father, mother, child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., adult, child, infant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Departure date of the voyage */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Arrival date of the voyage */,
  "destination_port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination port */,
  "voyage_route" TEXT /* Route taken by the ship */,
  "ship_captain" TEXT /* Name of the ship's captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_destination_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyage_passengers" (
  "voyage_passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage-passenger association */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "boarding_location" TEXT /* Location where the passenger boarded the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyage_passengers_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyage_passengers_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "crew_position" TEXT /* Position of the crew member (e.g., captain, officer, engineer) */,
  "crew_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ship_crew_ship_name FOREIGN KEY ("ship_name") REFERENCES ships ("ship_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "ship_type" TEXT /* Type of ship (e.g., passenger liner, cargo ship) */,
  "gross_tonnage" INTEGER /* Gross tonnage of the ship */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the ship in meters */,
  "beam" REAL /* Beam of the ship in meters */,
  "draft" REAL /* Draft of the ship in meters */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_voyages" (
  "ship_voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship-voyage association */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ship_voyages_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ship_voyages_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)
